title: Chups's sign pack for MTR - ENG Blue-gray
description: Over 120 different signs for Minecraft Transit Railway mod
body:
**NB: This is the English-only version of the Blue-gray version pack. Russian-only and Russian-English versions are in another projects.**

This resourcepack adds signs for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod.
The signs are inspired by Russian railways, but were heavily modified and stylized under my own fictional brand.

Each pack contains over 120 different signs. More signs will be added in the future, as well as new colors!

You can find signs like:
- arrows;
- platform and track numbers;
- warning signs;
- navigation inside the rail terminal, etc.

**[Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) and [Nemo's Transit Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) required!**

## Join my workshop in Discord 
[![discord link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb2328d527155ce1a072cf3be8370904f79d6fa7.png)](https://discord.gg/xhGhNjrwY8)
